sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">PVat.</title_> 11 = <title_ TEIform="title">Il Papiro Vaticano Greco</title_> 11 (1. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Φαβωρίνου περὶ φυγῆς;</foreign> 2. <title_ TEIform="title">Registri Fondiari della Marmarica</title_>), ed. M. Norsa & G. Vitelli, Città del Vaticano, Biblioteca Apostolica Vaticana 1931. (<title_ TEIform="title">Studi e Testi</title_> 53.)</item>
